_doc: Each arm = one skill injected via --append-system-prompt, fully isolated (--setting-sources project,local --strict-mcp-config, fresh workspace, no global config). prompt strings are exact. caveman/ponytail resolve from the local plugin cache on host; the Dockerfile vendors them in.

arms.name: yagni-oneliner
arms.appendText: Follow YAGNI principles, and prefer one-liner solutions.
